Who is Blue?

Your fave college girl
keeping it real

Streaming, creating, and building a community one viral moment at a time.

Blue, known online as Bluebeari3, is a Twitch streamer and multi-platform content creator with a massive following built on genuine personality, funny reactions, and unforgettable moments.

From live stream highlights to short-form clips that blow up across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, and Facebook — Blue's content is everywhere her fans are.

With 2M+ followers on Instagram alone and a growing Twitch community, she's one of the most shareable creators in her space right now.
